title: lessingianthus scabrifoliatus
intro: Lessingianthus scabrifoliatus is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Brazil. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Lessingianthus scabrifoliatus can be found in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat colds, flu, and other minor ailments.
